pattern: Group elements by their anti-diagonal index (i+j); within each diagonal collect elements bottom-to-top (higher row index first), then concatenate diagonals in increasing index order.
hints: An element at row i, column j belongs to anti-diagonal i+j; group all elements by this key.
Within each diagonal, elements from larger row indices appear earlier in the output (bottom-to-top traversal).
Sort diagonal groups by key and reverse each group by row index, then flatten to get the result.

edge_inputs.description: jagged grid with varying row lengths
each row has exactly one element (column vector)

stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    rows = rng.randint(1, min(size, 50))
    nums = []
    for _ in range(rows):
        cols = rng.randint(1, min(size // rows + 1, 50))
        nums.append([rng.randint(1, 100000) for _ in range(cols)])
    return [nums]
